sections.text: Blog > Impact of the New U.S. Tariff Policy on Customs Clearance Impact of the New U.S. Tariff Policy on Customs Clearance by: PCBWay Feb 05,2025 90993 Views 31 Comments Posted in News Summary： US imposes new tariffs on Chinese products Update on Dec 31th Current Tax Rates for Various PCBWay Products Bare PCBs : 45% Assembled boards : 35% Steel 、Aluminum& Copper (CNC,stencil, etc.) : About 85% SMT printing stencil :88% Others: General duty rates plus 10% Note: The above tax rates are estimated for reference only, as tax rates are subject to significant real-time fluctuations.
